new.name: shepherd
new.description: A runtime substrate that turns an agent's execution into a reversible, Git-like trace, so meta-agents can observe, fork, replay, and revert any run. Couples agent and environments in a copy-on-write fork ~5x faster than docker commit, with ~95% KV-cache reuse on replay. Framework built for meta-agents to supervise, optimize, and train other agents
